title: schizachyrium tenerum var. multinervosum
intro: Schizachyrium tenerum var. multinervosum, also known as the Little Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to the prairies of North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The plant has been traditionally used to promote overall health and well-being, with benefits including improved digestion, reduced fever, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, Schizachyrium tenerum var. multinervosum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
